extraction.one_line_summary: LANDA Mikel soloed to victory after Movistar attacked Dumoulin on the descent ~130km out, forcing teammates to chase and cracking him on final climb Pian Cavallo.
tactical_patterns: Movistar attacked Dumoulin on descent not climb at 130km out, forcing Sunweb domestiques to pace-make before finale
Zakarin attacked with 2.4km remaining, dropped Quintana temporarily, forcing Aru/Nibali to bring Movistar leader back gratis
Multiple GC riders attacked dying kilometers despite Quintana already virtual pink, suggesting podium spots still fluid enough to race

rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: isolated after long chase following descent attack, cracked on Pian Cavallo, lost pink jersey after domestiques exhausted early
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: dropped by Zakarin's 2.4km attack, required Aru/Nibali to bring him back, showed vulnerability despite taking pink
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: positive: attacked inside 3km on steep finish, immediately gapped Quintana/podium group, hunting podium not just stage placing
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: soloed to victory after securing mountains jersey, converted Sky's long-range tactics into dominant stage win
rider_signals.GESCHKE Simon: positive: sacrificed entire final climb for Dumoulin after extended pace-making from descent, exemplary domestique work
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: positive: followed Zakarin's late acceleration while Quintana couldn't, then contributed to bridging despite no team obligation
